entry.title: Re: What is the FIORI app for KE13 ?
entry.content:
Hello Dona,

here is the app for flexible upload: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('FINCS_UPL_EXEC')/S24OP

entry.title: VC CU50 characteristic sequence in General tab
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm in ECC 6.0.

Within the Variant Configuration, CU50 Simulation, I've an interface design set and would need to show, in the General Tab, the characteristics in a predefined order / sequence.

In the other Tabs, I can easily play with the char's sequence using the path

Value assignment - Interface design - Overview...

but what about the General tab?

Any help is very much appreciated!

Thanks and bye,

Jepy

entry.title: Re: #CoE#Worldex How to clean up for master data in P-sys...
entry.content: Hello Customer We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions. Best Regards, Stephen

entry.title: Re: Instructions for Emarsys & Postman
entry.content: when copying the pre-request script I get one line with all commented out. Found the same file with some additions on github and different approach as comment with external library: https://gist.github.com/bneff84/4f18157654e54d13112137347fa4c532 . Take what suits you best 😉

entry.title: Re: Can we extend the Employee Business Partner as/to Org...
entry.content:
Hello @evans_aarons ,

Employees are created as BPs, they get created as Person BPs. The documentation for this can be found on Business Partner Model in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 

No Person BPs are extended to Organistation BPs, this is not possible in any scenario. Instead different roles can be added to the BPs and they can become Suppliers, Customers etc.

Best Regards,
Stephen

entry.title: Re: Conditional UI Adaptation in SAP Fiori
entry.content: Hello Customer We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions. Best Regards, Stephen

entry.title: SAP Datasphere – Security Concept
entry.content:
SAP Datasphere (DSP) design differs from classic BW and therefore, a new approach is needed.

Space is the point of entry. Consider Spaces as Info Areas. Creating spaces and assigning users to specific spaces allows easier security maintenance and more straight forwards consumption. Row-Level data security is still applied however.

Roles Used:

Role

Description  

Space  

System Architect 

System and Cloud Administration

All

Data Architect 

Knows inbound data from all sources

Central

Solution Architect

Works on specific reporting requirements

Functional

 

Spaces Used:

Space

Description

Central

Connections, Data Persistency, DACs, Time and Conversion Tables, Private-Like Views and Reusable-like Views for sharing to Functional spaces

Security

Security Tables

Functional

Reusable and Query-like views for consumption

CSV (optional)

For CSV Uploads (if necessary for key users / like BW-Workspace)

 

Access Used:

Role

Space  

Access Type

System Architect 

All Spaces

Full

Data Architect 

Central

Full

Data Architect 

Functional

Read

Solution Architect

Central

Read

Solution Architect

Functional

Full

Security Team

Security

Full

Support Team

Central

DIM only

 

 

Security:

  • Security Tables will be in a separate Space to ensure that only specific users have access to them, but the DACs are built and assigned in the Central Space.

 

Central:

  • all connections – full control of all connections to all source systems
  • Persist the data (with Task Chains) – full control of the quota
  • Assign DAC (based on shared tables from the Security Space) to the persisted data / views / remote tables
  • Conversion (TCUR*, T006*) tables will be shared as Views
  • Time Tables can be shared directly or as Views

Central Space shares Reusable-Like views to Functional spaces.  

 

Functional:

  • only functional relevant (virtual) object
  • No data persisted
  • Possible to expand to Branche/Country Spaces, however can get ugly with the number of spaces afterwards, therefore proper technical name and self-explaining business name is necessary.

 

Functional Spaces use shared reusable views from the Central space, but restrict. Restriction is technically not necessary as the DAC will kick in anyway, but will help in the performance.

 

CSV:

  • Purely optional and only if it is necessary to upload any CSV user data (BW-Workspace like)
  • Separate space as the functional spaces should not persist any data

entry.title: Re: Request to enter a PIN for smart card when launching...
entry.content: Hello Mark,

entry.title: Set RAP BO response attributes
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have developed a RAP BO API, the BO is composed of some association db tables. For performance improving purpose, I don't want the response to perform an auto read operation to fetch all the attributes.

My idea is to manually set wanted attributes in the response body. Is it possible?

Regards,
Ming

entry.title: Global Running Day with SAP Community in Melbourne
entry.content:
This year the #GlobalRunningDay will be held on Wednesday, June 5th, 2024. 

This will be our third SAP Community running event in Melbourne. All SAP Community members are welcome and if you don’t want to run - you can walk or cycle!

Please read more in the post by @pjcools : https://community.sap.com/t5/melbourne-blog-posts/global-running-day-with-sap-community-in-melbourne-wednesday-5th-june-2024/ba-p/13698425

Leave your RSVP so that we can run together.

entry.title: Re: Request to enter a PIN for smart card when launching...
entry.content:
Hello Mark,
in that case I can only recommend that you create a customer incident for us. The alternative might be to change the certificate checking mode as per SAP Note 2892419.
Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: ESS & MSS ON S4HANA
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can anyone let me know how to configure ESS & MSS in S4 HANA.

entry.title: Re: Comments on BW/BPC live Connections in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello @mhf,

1. The details of the document store entry and the content itself can be viewed in BW. Please have a look at https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BW4HANA/ee8f1a1acc9f46f39b7c79eef625ada2/b3fd0c518a8b4b50a2a68f4fb547abb9.html?locale=en-US.

If you use the option 'Show document' you should see the content of the document.

2. In SAC we have two different types of comments:

- comments that describe (static) objects in the story

- comments that are attached to a selection of data and that change once the selection is changed (data point comments, comments in comment widget).

BW only offers a storage for comments that are selection dependent and that are in close relationship with the underlying data. Those comments are also available in other tools that display the corresponding BW data (such as Analysis for Office).

Comments describing story objects (such as charts, tables,...) are dependent on SAC objects that do not exist in other front ends (at least not in exactly the same form) and thus those comment remain in SAC (where these object are available).

Best regards

Gerd

entry.title: SAP workflow integration with external systems
entry.content: There is a rework operation in the SAP workflow. For the sales order approval workflow, clicking on rework can modify the order information of unfinished sales orders.If I choose an external workflow when defining approval requests, then this approval is done through an interface in the external system. Is there an interface for this rework that allows sales orders to have a rework button when approved externally? Clicking on rework in the external system can modify sales order information in the SAP system

entry.title: Build Process Automation - Handle Timeout of SAPUI5 Screen
entry.content:
Hello, I am fairly new to BPA and I am stuck on a problem I encountered.

I am automating a SAPUI5 Application, and I have multiple "Wait Ready(SAPUI5 Screen)" in my project for when the application is fetching backend data. The problem is that I need to handle a Timeout scenario. I have an "Or Error" node where I need to execute series of other steps when the timeout happens. However I am getting this message when I try to execute another automation from the Error node : "An asynchronous activity in a custom script may have failed. Add an await operator before each SDK activity call. Error: Wait Ready " Timeout error: Waiting for screen(s) xxx to appear (30 s)". Message mentions Custom script even though I did not use any and the On Error automation never executes. Could you please help ?

entry.title: Customization of Sales Order Screen Based on the Material Type
entry.content:
Scenario description: 

  1. We want the moment we enter the flight ticket item in the line item level, custom fields specific to the flight ticket should show, we don't want other irrelevant custom field to pop up. And likewise for hotel accommodation as well. IN short custom field visibility should depend on the material we are entering at line item level.
  2. We are generating the purchase requisition from the sale order using item category DBAB as the tickets are real time procured based on customer requirement. Custom fields filled with data in sale order should flow to Purchase requisition which will be generated from sale order. The custom field data should flow from PR to PO.
  3. We also want Custom fields data from sales orders should flow to billing documents as well. Standard copy control does not support custom field.

  4. A company is selling flight tickets and hotel accommodation service both in one sale order. 


    First Scenario:

    1. We want the moment we enter the flight ticket item in the line item level, custom fields specific to the flight ticket should show, we don't want other irrelevant custom fields to pop up. And likewise for hotel accommodation as well. Inshort custom field visibility should depend on the material we are entering at line item level.

    2. We have activated the BADI: 

      Hiding of Custom Item Fields for Mass Change of Sales Documents

      ID : SD_MASSCHG_SLSDOC_ITM_HIDE_EXT

      And this is the logic we have copied from the sample code provided by SAP: Can you let me know what changes we need to make to the logic?

entry.title: Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
Let me explain my business scenario.
There are two step of  PR Document.
PR1. Request of Work (Request to Management for start work)
and then after approve, Keep going to PR2
PR2. Request of Material (Request to Management to buy Material)
It is related with Project System WBS. 
Now in SAP S/4 hana Cloud Public edition, we can't create PR to PR Ref Document.
so how can support to my client for this scenario. If have any advice solution,
Please kindly.
Thanks for your contribution.
Regards
Wai Wai
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA System Copy- Homogeneous On Multi Tenant Database
entry.content:
We are doing SAP S/4HANA 2021 system copy by backup/restore method
While using SWPM to build target system we are getting below error


 error occurred while processing option SAP S/4HANA Server 2021 > SAP HANA Database > System Copy > Target System > Standard System > Based on AS ABAP > Standard System (Last error reported by the step: The name DBACOCKPIT for user SAPSID is not unique. It is already used for user DBACOCKPIT.
SOLUTION: Choose a different username. ). 

ERROR 2024-05-15 11:41:32.490 (root/sapinst) (startInstallation) [iaxxbjsmod.cpp:83] id=nw.usernameNotUnique errno=CJS-30207
<html> <head> </head> <body> The name <b>DBACOCKPIT</b> for user <b>SAPSID</b> is not unique. It is already used for user <b>DBACOCKPIT</b>. <br>SOLUTION: Choose a different username. </body></html>

ERROR 2024-05-15 11:41:32.652 (root/sapinst) (startInstallation) [CSiStepExecute.cpp:1105] id=controller.stepExecuted errno=FCO-00011 CSiStepExecute::execute()
The step replicateSchemaPasswordsForExistingDatabase with step key |NW_ABAP_OneHost|ind|ind|ind|ind|0|0|NW_Onehost_System|ind|ind|ind|ind|onehost|0|NW_CreateDBandLoad|ind|ind|ind|ind|createdbandload|0|NW_CreateDB|ind|ind|ind|ind|createdb|0|NW_HDB_DB|ind|ind|ind|ind|nw_hdb_db|0|replicateSchemaPasswordsForExistingDatabase was executed with status ERROR (Last error reported by the step: <html> <head> </head> <body> The name <b>DBACOCKPIT</b> for user <b>SAPSID</b> is not unique. It is already used for user <b>DBACOCKPIT</b>. <br>SOLUTION: Choose a different username. </body></html>).

entry.title: Performance indicator with KP* ID's are not available in Process Intelligence
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have below shown performance indicators in Process Insights and we want the corresponding KP* Id's to be available in Process Intelligence.  Is there any way these KP* Id's can be pushed from Insight to Intelligence ?  

Process Intelligence below, missing above highlighted performance indicator (corresponding KP's) highlighted in yellow.  Kindly assist on how can we make them available in Intelligence. 

Thanks and Regards

DJ

entry.title: Re: VC CU50 characteristic sequence in General tab
entry.content: @jepi_flanders did you check in /pmevc & in Fiori UI which will display general tab

entry.title: Curious question about the custom code analysis, scoping and adaptation
entry.content:
Hi,

Recently we started S4 Conversion migration topic. At this moment we have activated the custom code usage tracking(SCMON) in prod systems couple of weeks back. On the other hand also, we had run the ATC with central ATC system (NW 7.51) despite the recommended is 7.52 version. The ATC resulted something like below for our ERP dev system

  • around 80K prio 1
  • around 12k prio 2
  • around 60K prio 3

We used S4HANA_READINESS_REMOTE check variant for ATC run. Out of these 150K items, the categorization is roughly as below.

So we have downloaded the result list and found some interesting topics and along with few open questions to check with the community as below.

1. Out of 150K check items, there are 132K duplicates found and only 27K are unique records. Not sure why so many duplicate was reported in ATC result. Does this is common behavior in ATC findings? 

2. After excluding $TMP objects the final unique came around 12K check items. So, I'm curious to know now how many items of this we can do the adaptation before SUM and how do we need to categorize those which can be done with S4HANA upgradation?

3. I agree we need to wait few more months of SCMON data from the productive system, but once that is ready how do we need to exclude those from ATC result list to focus only the final scope of custom code to do adaptation during preperation and realization phase.

4. Does there any general recommendation on what is the best practice to do estimation and potential changes that need to be done for each of 6 different check categories in this check variant? This is crucial for us to do the effort estimation with t-shirt sizing to know roughly which type of check message is needed how much time and how the change looks like in general for each of this check message type.

5. Any help document from SAP about Prio1 , 2 & 3 about it's definition. Which one it's must to fix for conversion project? I remember Thomas Fiedler mentioned that prio 1 and 2 is must to fix. Not sure is this still valid statement or not.

6. If we don't use NW 7.52 for remote ATC, do we see the difference in ATC result list or it's only the UI (like more statistic categories) differences which help to analyze the AT result?

Best Regards,

Praveen

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Fiori Elements upload / download image
entry.content:
@naveenvishal 

How about using the Attachment plugin? (Please note that it is currently a beta feature)

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/plugins/#attachments

entry.title: Re: List of material master tables.
entry.content:
Hi,

MARA Material master

MAKT Material text

MARC Material per plant / stock

MVKE Material master, sales data

MARD Storage location / stock

MSKA Sales order stock

MSPR Project stock

MARM Units of measure

MEAN International article number

PGMI Planning material

PROP Forecast parameters

MAPR Link MARC <=> PROP

MBEW Material valuation

MVER Material consumption

MLGN Material / Warehouse number

MLGT Material / Storage type

MPRP Forecast profiles

MLAN Tax data material master

MTQSS Material master view: QM

STXB SAPscript: Texts in non-SAPscript format

STXH STXD SAPscript text file header

STXL STXD SAPscript text file lin

 

Regards,

Rohan Chauhan

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Sunset
entry.content:
Hi KS2,

SAP GUI transactions are an integral part of the UI strategy for S/4HANA, both now and in the future. As such, the diverse products in the SAP GUI family will not only be maintained but also enhanced with future developments. There are no plans to discontinue these products.

See SAP Note 147519 and/or

  • SAP GUI for Windows 8.10 is currently under development and planned for Q4 2025 (subject to change).
  • SAP GUI for Java 8.10 is currently under development and planned for Q4 2024 (subject to change).
  • SAP GUI for HTML is shipped with new developments together with each SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud release.

Kind regards
Thorsten Dencker
(SAP UI-Technology)

entry.title: Differentiate workflow/For your today items in homepage between main and concurrent profiles
entry.content:
Hi all, 

When a user switching to an employment, under Approvals and For you today of all employments (including main and secondary assignment) are shown. 

 

Only when we click onto domain like My forms or Objectives in main menu, it will display data relative to the selected employment.

Is this the standard behavior of SAP SF or can we do anything to separate data based on selected employment? 

Appreciate any help.

entry.title: SAP PI - Huge messages are in Scheduled Status - Update the status
entry.content:
Hi Friends, 

Good day. 

In SAP PI (7.5) , Message Monitoring overview screen, huge messages count is shown under Scheduled column. When we click the count, there is no messages come. i.e. no messages are available.

Restarting the PI system also did not help to update the status of the messages (to move them to Cancelled). 

I get stuck how to clear these messages (to move them to cancelled status)

Please find the screen shot. Kindly clarify. 

Thank you.

Regards, 

Jegatheeswaran P.

In the attached image called Glossary-Directlink.png,  is there a way to obtain a direct link and go to the Glossary directly?

entry.title: Re: How to consider time for repacking when calculating material availability date in sales order
entry.content: when the scenarios of repacking is needed? could you bit explain more--also one query if one customer orders this material from X plant-will there be any situations demands for repacking for the same customer & plant combination?

entry.title: How to use different versions of planning in a planning model in sap analytics cloud?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Analytics Cloud experts.

I'm stuck on something that I'm sure is idiotic, but I can't seem to figure out how it works.

I've watched hundreds of tutorials and videos where they explain how to use Planning versions within stories, but I can't get to the point of understanding how to load data in different versions or how to have them available in a model. When I create the model and then add the rest of the dimensions I only have Actuals available. And I can't add any of them.

If I delete the dimension table to create it again I get the “option” to create a new category, but it does not let me and I get the message: “only available if at least one source dimension exists”.

In the stories I create, the Version History option is always disabled.

I have tried, in the Import Jobs, to do data loads by selecting the version, but it never lets me choose any other than Actuals.

How can I use the versions in my models?

Thank you very much!!

entry.title: Re: Understanding how to configure Alert Correlation Rules in SAP Focused Run
entry.content: @wenjie_he , You can add only one attribute while creating the rule. Thanking you for pointing out this. I have updated the document.

entry.title: Re: Header Pricing Condition Print Option for Purchase Or...
entry.content: Seems you are using a standard driver program for your PO outputs..Please go through the F1 option here -may help you better.

entry.title: Re: Fixed asset migration cockpit FAA_MD 207
entry.content: You need to enter a capitalization date in the Ledger tab for at least one ledger.

entry.title: SAP BTP subaccount trial Login Error
entry.content:
Hello, 

I tried to log on #SAPBTP subaccount trial for accessing the #ABAP cloud project through #ECLIPSE with appropriate login credentials, and it showed 'Sorry, we could not authenticate you. Try again.'

The same error was thrown when I tried to access the business application studio (BAS) on the SAP BTP TRIAL account.

It would be helpful if anyone guided me to rectify this issue.

 

Best wishes,

Aravindhan

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud in China - Data Storage
entry.content: We are an existing S4HC client live since 2021 hosted in a USA Data Center. We have companies in China and Hong Kong but they are a small percent of total data. How can this be handled?  Or how can we have most of our data in USA data center in Iowa while a small percentage is in China?

entry.title: cannot create new sap pi PIT run configuration
entry.content:
after adding all PIT roles and running config wizard there is still issue with making new run configurations for test cases. In Web gui the '+' button is grey

and NWDS it is not possible to add it due to some error in background (the same user gets application response from postman:))

"An error occurred while retrieving the data.
javax.xml.soap.SOAPException: Error accessing "http:xxxxxxxxxxxx/IntegratedConfigurationInService/IntegratedConfigurationInImplBean?style=document". Response code is 401, response message is "Unauthorized"

any suggestions?

entry.title: ADT Links in MS Teams etc.
entry.content:
Hi all!

I'm using Eclipse for ABAP (with ADT) and there is this nice feature ADT Links, which can link you directly to the source code.

Unfortunatelly, it is not possible to add this kind of link inside Microsoft Teams chat, or Webex, because it starts with adt:// and not with http://

Is there any workaround for this? (obviosly except putting link in the caht as text and then Copy&Paste it in Eclipse) I tried some URL shorteners, but none seemed to support adt://  Is there maybe some way to wrap the link?

What I want to have is a clickable link in a MS Teams conversation or in Webex chat. Is it possible?

Thank you in advance! 🙂

O.

Thanks

Kishore Jain

entry.title: Re: When using Crystal Report in C#, a specific part of a...
entry.content: Update: R&D noticed the issue also and will try to fix it, may be too late for SP 36 now.

entry.title: Re: Having issue in Integration Advisor MAG IDOC to EDIFACT
entry.content: You can use conditional mapping of nodes by including UEPOS in conjunction with exists( ).

entry.title: Re: BW Bridge : The use of ...... is not permitted
entry.content:
No, this is not necessary. You can call your own custom developed function modules and classes without releasing them.

My previous comment was about function modules, classes, interfaces, data types, database tables, etc. provided by SAP which may - or may not - be released. See the API State tab in the Properties view of the artifact in question.

entry.title: Re: Edit function not available in Fiori elements app obj...
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake

thanks for your feedback and the further info. I have tried to simply add these mentioned fragments in the behaviour definition(s) and also created with quick fix the draft tables. It is still not working properly (however after exposing the draft actions, at least the edit button appears). Now I am going to figure out, what is still needed. In my usecase no direct table update happens in the CRUD functions, but I call some standard ABAP methods to update specific objects. 
Your hints are usefull and thanks for them.

Br
Gergely

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Melbourne May 2024
entry.content: I think the time on the Community Calendar is incorrect. It has it at 17:30 CET not Australian Time.

entry.title: Re: SAP Manucfatering Execution Training
entry.content: Yes we do. Regards Dietmar

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Business Partner Replication
entry.content:
As long as the provider system (the target system) is named correct according to the SLD (System Landscape Definition) - you don't have to set a default outbound port !!

Therefore, the logical port should NOT be set to default. The system will figure it out as long as you define the provider system name correctly in SOAMANAGER (according to SLD)!

Also: Profile-name and profile-version must be the same in both systems !!!!

entry.title: Purchase agreement field not found into PO DTW , SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am not able to find out the Purchase agreement blanket number field into purchase order DTW template.

How can I link Purchase blanket agreement with PO via DTW template?

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
I've been seeing these comments about this version being unstable and I just wanted to share that I have been consistently running it on my machine for over 3-4 days at a time and I've yet had an issue where I can't connect to the instance. I do notice from the chart below that memory usage does increase slightly over time. I am running Windows 11 and I have a 64GB memory machine.
*The "blip" in the chart below is when I restarted the container due to a Docker update to v4.30.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements- Extension and Customization- Step by Step
entry.content: Same question here...what about BAS?

entry.title: Show week entered and previous week
entry.content:
Hello experts I need your help with something.

In SAP BO (old version BO but I don't know the version number)

I want the user to enter data for a calendar year and week (0CALWEEK) and see the data for the week entered and the previous week according to the date entered. How can I do this?

You can imagine the sample view of my report as in the picture.

Thanks in advance for your help

entry.title: IPS only provision entity, if user logged into another system
entry.content:
Hi all,

I received the requirement to provision users from AzureAD to SAP Enable Now, which should be pretty straight forward as far as I know.

But now I got asked, if it is possible to only provision users to SAP Enable Now, if they, at least once, logged in to SAP Concur. The thought process behind all that is, that we might save some licences, if only the employees, who actually work with SAP Concur are provisioning, instead of every employee of the company.

Now I have two questions.

1. Generally speaking, is it possible, to only provision from a source system to a target system, if they logged into another system, which is neither source nor target?

2. If this is possible, how would I check for this in a condition?

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to use different versions of planning in a planni...
entry.content:
1. In a story, add a table widget connected to your planning model.
2. Click the table widget to make sure it's selected, then try to find the 'Version Management' icon in the tool bar.
3. Create a new public from that version management panel.

p.s. you should also have maintain access to that planning model, and a planning license for this to work.

entry.title: Negative Deduction config changes not impacting on existing Quota record
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need your help!!!

My business requirement it to change Negative deduction field of Annual Quota to -10 days from V_T559L so that Employee can apply for leaves till negative quota balance -10 days. 
I did the change to Neg Ded to field in V_T559L to -10 days effective from 01.06.2024, by delimiting the previous record.

While testing the scenarios I noticed that - 

1. For new hires/next year, it is working fine. I can see -10 days negative deduction in IT2006.

2. For existing employees (for which Annual quota record was already available with previous config of 0 negative deduction in this year 2024), negative deduction -10 days is NOT coming in existing record.

I cannot delete IT2006 annual quota record of all employees as leaves are already taken in this year. Also, cannot change quota end date as system is not allowing.

Could you please help me to solve this? Business wants this new change to be replicated from 01.06.2024 only.

Thank you.

Pratik

entry.title: Re: How to use different versions of planning in a planni...
entry.content: For import jobs, you can map a column from your source file or create a new field using the custom expression editor with a hardcoded version name. If you enable 'Update local members' in the import job settings, and map that new column, the version will be created as well.

entry.title: Re: Building a fantasy baseball app with AppGyver
entry.content: Definitely a nice example !

entry.title: Re: Hello all, I am new here in this community. My goal i...
entry.content: yes, thanks

entry.content:
Thank you prasadbalaji, very informative and helpful! Especially the table with the differences! 

Quick question that I've been trying to figure out: I would like to run BOP variants with a criteria that it's only run if my actual stock is above 10% of the requirements in all orders. Would you happen to know if this is possible? 

 

Thanks so much in advance! 
Mae

entry.title: Re: Scanning transactions for the warehouse in SAP Fiori / S/4HANA
entry.content: Maybe best to start with something like this... https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-ewm-rfui-screen-using-ewm-mobgui-service-personalize-with-sap-screen/ba-p/13543880

entry.title: How to enable timestamps on document tab for DocuSign integration
entry.content:
According to documentation it is possible to see timestamps for status changes on additional info column on Documents tab:

In addition, in the Documents quote tab, the user can see the document they sent out for signing in the Generated Documents section. Here, the user can view the document along with all the status changes with precise timestamps (in server time), informing them about the progress of the signing process.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CPQ/f80fbcd4f1c74232839c30ce26886f07/923ac571c47a495eb78068bd0004bfc4.html

But there is no indication how to enable this additional column, how this can be achieved?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to enable timestamps on document tab for DocuSign...
entry.content: To enable the additional info column, there is a dedicated application parameter "Additional Info Visibility", under Shopping Cart and Quotes (in Application Parameters). This parameter needs to be set to true in order to show the column and related information.

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing 24.05 Release Highlights
entry.content:
SAP Digital Manufacturing 24.05 Release is LIVE in Quality spaces, see below some of the latest innovations. Learn more about all 24.05 Release innovations at What's New Viewer.

📦Create custom Handling Units via Production Process

📉New Shift Progress plugin in Line Monitor POD

Learn more here.

🌐  Global Variables in Production Processes

🧮 Real-Time Monitoring View in REO

Learn more here.

🧮 Display the Five Latest Indicator Values in Line Monitor POD

Learn more here.

📬' Manage Mail Server Configurations' app was deprecated and a brand new Destination in SAP Digital Manufacturing BTP Subaccount Cockpit called 'SAP_DM_NOTIFICATIONS_MAIL' was created automatically

📉Assign Nonconformance Codes to OEE Reason Codes in Assign OEE Reason Codes app to report quality losses

Experiencing SAP Digital Manufacturing

You can have a glimpse and experience several aspects of SAP Digital Manufacturing via the Interactive Value Journeys below:

Discrete within SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud
Process Industry within SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud
Tool Management within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Resource Orchestration within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Production Process Design within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Shop Floor Orchestration with SAP Digital Manufacturing
Time Tracking within SAP Digital Manufacturing
SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
Nonconformances Processes within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Discrete Manufacturing in Private Cloud, powered by SAP
Discrete Manufacturing in Public Cloud, powered by SAP
Process Industry Manufacturing with SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
AI-driven Visual Inspection (BETA) powered by SAP


Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Re: MIGO - OBYC transaction key for price differences
entry.content:
Hello @marnun 

Check the documentation to the configuration node: Materials Management -> Valuation and Account Assignment -> Account Determination -> Account Determination Without Wizard -> Configure Automatic Postings. All standard transaction keys and account modifiers are detailed there.

The transaction key most commonly used for price differences is PRD:

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Inventory Accounting with Universal Parallel Accounting in SAP S/4HANA 2022
entry.content:
Hi @sanjay_soni7 

The first transition scenarios were delivered with OP2023. These allow you to activate universal parallel accounting for multiple legal valuations and move from parallel cost of goods manufactured to universal parallel accounting.

Further scenarios to migrate group and/or profit center valuation from a multi-valuation ledger are planned with OP2025.

entry.title: ByD / C4C Built-in Support is down
entry.content:
Currently ByD / C4C Built-in Support is not working.

No new cases created by Customers/Partners through 'Built in Support' appear in the ticketing tool for our Technical Support Engineers to work on. This impacts all priorities.

What we know

  • This stopped working since yesterday 14th of May 08:57 UTC 14.05.2024 for both products ByD / C4C.
  • Customers are receiving the following message: “The receipt of incident 1000000xxx has not yet been confirmed by the provider”
  • All new cases created after 14th of May 08:57 UTC 14.05.2024  are affected.
  • It appears currently that existing cases can be returned and are visible to Support Engineers. (This is been continually monitored at this point)

Current Workaround

Customers & Partners will need to created new cases via the following:

  • SAP for Me
  • Use following link - https://me.sap.com/home

To reach Technical Support please use the above link or the Expert Chat channel.

Root-Cause

  • This is yet to be determined. 
  • The issue is being analyzed by Support, Operations and Development.

Further updates to this blog will be made as new information emerges.

We apologize for this temporary inconvenience

Thanks,

SAP Technical Support

entry.content:

I am looking for infomation on connection SAP FSM to BW/4HANA or Datasphere.
Does anybody has experiences with that or can give some hints.

Thanks Dirk

entry.title: Webinar "Ensure Product Compliance with SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance" on May 23rd
entry.content:
I'd like to draw your attention to this upcoming webinar which our Product Marketing Manager for Product Compliance, Dr. Rüdiger Kreuzholz will hold on May 23rd.

Companies that manufacture or sell products must make sure that their products comply with a growing number of regulations and requirements. To help companies with these challenges, SAP has developed a new product compliance solution called SAP S/4HANA for product compliance. 

This is ideal if you are new to the solution and would like to get insights and ;

  • Hear about SAP’s vision and strategy for SAP S/4HANA for product compliance
  • Get an overview of the solution
  • Catch a glimpse of the solution with a short offline demo

You can register here ! Feel free share with your colleagues and partners, as the webinar is open to all and free-of-charge.

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales Cloud Relationship Intelligence Setup - Sales Cloud Side Configuration
entry.content: Hi, another note is that for "Group Name", the group's email address(ex.ABC@XXX.com) needs to be provided under group section. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: New 1H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
Dear @PetraRana 

we changed the name of the object in scope of the 'monthly time sheets'. We explained it in the WNV too, see Monthly Time Sheets The new name reflects better what it is.

Best regards

Stephanie

entry.title: Vincular OINV y ODLN
entry.content:
Hola!

Quiero generar una query que me devuelta los albanes de un año que se han facturado un año posterior.

He generado el codigo que adjunto pero me mezcla albaranes y facturas. No me muestra la factura correcta para ese albarán.

¿Me puede ayudar alguien con esto? Gracias!!

 

SELECT DISTINCT
    T3."CardCode" AS "Cliente",
    T3."DocNum" AS "NumAlbaran",
    T3."DocEntry" AS "NavegarAlbaran",
    T0."CardCode",
    T0."DocNum" AS "NumFactura",
    T3."DocDate" AS "FechaContabilizacionAlbaran",
    T0."DocDate" AS "FechaContabilizacionFactura"
FROM 
    OINV T0  
INNER JOIN 
    INV1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"
LEFT JOIN
    DLN1 T2 ON T1."BaseEntry" = T2."DocEntry" 
LEFT JOIN 
    ODLN T3 ON T1."DocEntry" = T3."DocEntry"
WHERE 
    YEAR(T3."DocDate") = '2023' 
    AND YEAR(T0."DocDate") = '2024'

entry.title: Re: Alert inbox: Sold-to-party not in all monitoring items
entry.content:
Hello, 

The Sold-to-Party is only available for type Technical System and not for other system types as Databases or Instances, this is a limitation which cannot be enhanced due to technical reasons.

Regards

entry.title: how to hide any tab of header or Item in Sals document and Billing document in SAP
entry.content:
Hi 

Is there any way to hide the Condition tab for certain users in SAP sales order and Billing document  ( header /Item  level).

If yes, what is the standard Solution -

Best Regards

Sardar

entry.title: Re: Growth Portfolio and Performance forms synchronization
entry.content: Hi @maseitner, as far as I know, for your first question, you need to define the Attribute/Job mapping in Job Profile Builder to make it appear in a form using "job specific".

entry.title: Re: Purchase agreement field not found into PO DTW , SAP...
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you checked POR1 template for following fields:

AgrNo = Agreement No.

AgrLnNum = Agreement Row Number

Check in DEMO for the field names in POR1 in Query Generator for surety on the fields.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Spock tests in /web/testsrc not executed
entry.content:
This issue was fixed by SAP in the patch 2211.22

See the details under https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/75d4c3895cb346008545900bffe851ce/2b10bc71db0242d8a22583ff79b422de.html#fixing-issue-with-spock-tests-not-being-compiled

entry.title: Towards Data-Driven Process Modeling – Enhanced BPMN miner at SAP Signavio Process Intelligence
entry.content:
"Towards Data-Driven Process Modeling" is a series of blog posts with the aim of looking into data-driven approaches in the process modeling space that are transforming the practice. This post is the second in the series, building upon the initial piece on the process modeling lifecycle, which also covers the explanation of various data types that can be leveraged for modeling.

In today's digital age, data is serving as the cornerstone for informed decision-making across industries. Process management is not an exception and leveraging data can unveil invaluable insights into the organizational workflows, shedding light on optimization opportunities. Process modeling stands as one of the core phases of every BPM initiative, and leveraging data whenever possible is key to expediting this process. This approach enables process professionals such as owners, modelers, and analysts to focus more on the details and fine-tuning, rather than starting the modeling process from scratch. With the advent of process mining data, organizations now have access to a wealth of information that can revolutionize their approach to process modeling.  

For many years, different algorithms have been designed to mine BPMN models, yet they often come with challenges such as accuracy, completeness, and speed. Split Miner is a groundbreaking algorithm designed to discover process models from event logs in process mining with elevated accuracy and efficiency. with SAP Signavio Process Intelligence incorporating Split Miner (check the release communication), organizations can harness the potential of their process mining data for modeling like never before. 

Why discover BPMN models with Split Miner? 

Split Miner represents a paradigm shift in process model discovery methodology. Unlike previous algorithms, such as various iterations of the inductive miner, Split Miner excels in accuracy, completeness, and speed. Its innovative approach to filter the directly-follows graph induced by event logs and identify split gateways ensures unparalleled accuracy in process discovery. By striking a balance between fitness, precision, and generalization, Split Miner produces simple process models that accurately capture concurrency and causal relations. 

Moreover, Split Miner's efficiency streamlines the process of deriving BPMN models from process mining data, significantly reducing time-to-insight. By automating the discovery of split gateways and concurrency relations, Split Miner empowers organizations to focus their efforts on analysis and optimization, rather than laborious manual model construction. 

Three key benefits of this updated algorithm in SAP Signavio Process Intelligence are: 

  • Enhanced Accuracy: Split Miner employs a novel approach to filter the directly-follows graph induced by an event log, ensuring unparalleled accuracy in process discovery. 
  • Increased Efficiency: With Split Miner, organizations can expedite the process of deriving BPMN models from their process mining data, significantly reducing time-to-insight. By automating the discovery of split gateways and concurrency relations, Split Miner streamlines the process discovery phase, empowering process professionals to focus their efforts on analysis and optimization. 
  • Improved Collaboration: Split Miner's accuracy and speed enhance collaboration across departments, like IT and business domains. By generating accurate, easy-to-understand business process models, Split Miner enables focus on collaboration over early-stage model fixing. 

How to generate BPMN models in SAP Signavio Process Intelligence? 

In SAP Signavio Process Intelligence, leveraging Split Miner to extract BPMN models from variant explorer is a straightforward process. Follow these steps to export variants as a BPMN model: Select Variants: Begin by selecting one or more variants from the panel on the right within the variant explorer. 

  1. Select Variants: Begin by selecting one or more variants from the panel on the right within the variant explorer component.
  2. Generate BPMN: Once your desired variants are selected, choose "Generate BPMN" to create a BPMN 2.0-compliant model. 
  3. Edit in Process Manager: The SAP Signavio Process Manager editor will automatically open, displaying the generated process model of the selected variant(s). 
  4. Customize: Here, you have the flexibility to customize the process model as needed. You can name the process model, make adjustments, and refine details to ensure accuracy and alignment with organizational requirements. 
  5. Save Changes: Once satisfied with the modifications, simply save the process model within the Process Manager editor. 

By following these simple steps, users can seamlessly harness the power of process model discovery by means of mining BPMN models within SAP Signavio Process Intelligence as well as its integration with SAP Signavio Process Manager editor in order to export variants as BPMN models, fine-tune, and store them in the process repository of SAP Signavio.  

Example BPMN model generated in SAP Signavio Process Intelligence 

Summary and Outlook: 

In conclusion, the introduction of Split Miner within SAP Signavio Process Intelligence signifies a transformative leap in process model discovery methodology. By integrating data-driven modeling, SAP Signavio Process Intelligence empowers organizations to unlock the full potential of their process mining data, revolutionizing the way they approach process modeling (also look at how modeling and mining complement each other). One of the core use cases is what SAP Signavio provides under the umbrella of the Plug and Gain approach with which you can quickly analyze your SAP processes and generate a BPMN model out of the desired variants for further investigations such as comparison with reference models or leveraging it for further analysis with process simulation. 

As we continue to delve deeper into the realm of data-driven modeling, the possibilities for process optimization and business excellence are endless. By leveraging insights from process mining data, organizations can gain a competitive edge, drive innovation, and achieve operational excellence. Stay tuned for further insights and innovations as we continue this exciting journey towards data-driven process modeling.

entry.title: MARD table inconsistency Stock not update as per Report MB52
entry.content: What is the issue if MCHB , MMBE , MB52 Stock showing but Stock not showing in MARD and not able to do any future movement please help.

entry.title: Re: Problem with 2023 year-end in fixed asset accounting
entry.content:
There must be unposted planned depreciation. 

Check the asset involved, you could add a time interval for the periods that have planned depreciation and use depreciation key 0000 (no depreciation), see if the planned values fall off. Then close the fiscal year, then create a new time interval and add the depreciation key you want to use to calculate depreciation for the new year. 

Test is on your quality system first.

entry.title: Re: BP not exists in BP tcode nor in BUT000 table but BP...
entry.content:
Hi all,

are there any news about that problem? We have the same issue and I cannot find any solution.

Thank you in advance and BR

Daniel
